agent_promises: 35% of first annual premium as cash bonus from first year for whole life

product_fit.mismatch_reason: Customer already holds 11 policies, may be saturated.
missed_opportunities: Did not ask about specific financial goals for the new policy.

approachability.reasoning: Customer is engaged and sharing personal financial details, though he already holds 11 policies.

call_narrative.opening_hook: The agent introduced herself from HDFC Life and pitched a plan with a 35% cash bonus, to which the customer responded with interest.
call_narrative.customer_response: The customer was engaged and cooperative, answering questions about his income and existing policies.
call_narrative.key_event: The customer clarified his monthly income is around 50k after initially confusing the agent with lower figures.
call_narrative.ending: The call ended while the agent was discussing family income, with no final decision or callback set.

key_quotes: Matlab main na 50k ke karib kar leta hun 50k.
Ye pehle pehle li hai madam, jab main Max Life mein kaam kar raha tha.
